top_signals.title: India Raises Fuel Prices Again as Iran War Squeezes Refiners
top_signals.summary: India’s state-run refiners raised fuel prices for the second time in less than a week, as they grapple with economic losses after the Middle East conflict drove the cost of crude significantly higher.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Australia Urgently ‘Needs a Lot More Gas,’ Energy Executives Say
top_signals.summary: Australia must invest in producing more natural gas to avoid a domestic shortfall later this decade, fossil fuel executives said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Minnesotan banks and credit unions set to provide crypto custody August 1
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Musk slams Altman trial verdict as a 'technicality,' vows to appeal
top_signals.summary: A jury in Oakland, California, ruled against Elon Musk in his dramatic court battle with Sam Altman and OpenAI.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
